dashboard.title: Dashboard

dashboard.emptyDashboard: Your dashboard is empty. Add widgets to get started.

trackOrders.title: Track Sales Order
trackOrders.subtitle: Monitor current sales orders and their linked fulfillment documents

trackPurchaseOrders.title: Track Purchase Order
trackPurchaseOrders.subtitle: Monitor purchase orders and their linked receiving and invoice documents

total_revenue.title: Total Revenue
total_revenue.description: Total revenue across all sales channels

total_orders.title: Total Orders
total_orders.description: Number of sales orders in the period

pending_approvals_sales.title: Pending Approval - Sales
pending_approvals_sales.description: Documents awaiting approval in the sales pipeline

pending_approvals_purchase.title: Pending Approval - Purchase
pending_approvals_purchase.description: Documents awaiting approval in the purchase pipeline

travel_planner_overview.title: Travel Planner Budget
travel_planner_overview.description: Budget, spend, and active trip plans

kpi_roe.title: ROE
kpi_roe.description: Return on Equity — Net Profit / Equity

kpi_net_profit_margin.title: Net Profit Margin
kpi_net_profit_margin.description: Net Profit / Revenue — percentage of revenue that becomes net profit

kpi_gross_profit_margin.title: Gross Profit Margin
kpi_gross_profit_margin.description: Gross Profit / Revenue — pricing power indicator

kpi_inventory_turnover.title: Inventory Turnover
kpi_inventory_turnover.description: COGS / Average Inventory — how many times inventory sells per year

kpi_dio.title: DIO
kpi_dio.description: Days Inventory Outstanding — average days stock is held before selling

kpi_ar_days.title: AR Days (DSO)
kpi_ar_days.description: Days Sales Outstanding — average days to collect receivables

kpi_ap_days.title: AP Days (DPO)
kpi_ap_days.description: Days Payable Outstanding — average days to pay suppliers

kpi_ccc.title: CCC
kpi_ccc.description: Cash Conversion Cycle — total days cash is tied up in operations (DIO + DSO − DPO)

kpi_cost_per_delivery.title: Cost/Delivery
kpi_cost_per_delivery.description: Average cost per delivery — logistics efficiency metric

kpi_utilization_rate.title: Utilization Rate
kpi_utilization_rate.description: Fleet/capacity utilization — actual usage vs total capacity

kpi_otd_rate.title: OTD Rate
kpi_otd_rate.description: On-Time Delivery Rate — percentage of deliveries on time (target >95%)

kpi_roa.title: ROA
kpi_roa.description: Return on Assets — how efficiently assets generate profit

kpi_asset_turnover.title: Asset Turnover
kpi_asset_turnover.description: Revenue / Total Assets — asset efficiency ratio

kpi_opex_vs_capex.title: Cost Structure
kpi_opex_vs_capex.description: OPEX vs CAPEX breakdown with depreciation tracking

owner_intelligence.title: Owner Intelligence
owner_intelligence.description: Auto-generated business health analysis, bottleneck detection, and actionable insights

roe_low.title: ROE critically low
roe_low.description: Return on Equity is {formatted} — investors expect at least 15%.
roe_low.action: Review pricing strategy and cost structure to improve net profit.

gpm_low.title: Gross margin too thin
gpm_low.description: Gross Profit Margin is {formatted} — indicates COGS eating into revenue.
gpm_low.action: Negotiate better supplier pricing or increase selling prices.

dio_high.title: Inventory sitting too long
dio_high.description: DIO is {formatted} — stock takes too many days to sell.
dio_high.action: Run clearance promotions for slow-moving inventory. Review reorder points.

ccc_danger.title: Cash Conversion Cycle is dangerously long
ccc_danger.description: CCC is {formatted} — cash is stuck in operations too long. This can kill your business.
ccc_danger.action: Accelerate AR collection, extend AP terms, reduce inventory days.

ar_slow.title: Receivables collection is slow
ar_slow.description: AR Days (DSO) is {formatted} — customers are paying too slowly.
ar_slow.action: Enforce stricter payment terms. Follow up on overdue invoices.

otd_low.title: On-Time Delivery below target
otd_low.action: Review route planning and fleet capacity. Investigate delivery bottlenecks.

asset_poor.title: Asset efficiency is poor
asset_poor.description: ROA is {formatted} — assets are not generating enough profit.
asset_poor.action: Evaluate underutilized assets. Consider leasing instead of owning.

opex_high.title: OPEX ratio is high
opex_high.description: Operating expenses are {formatted} of total costs — review operational efficiency.
opex_high.action: Identify and reduce non-essential operating expenses.

healthSummaries.good: Business is in healthy condition. All key metrics are within acceptable ranges.
healthSummaries.warning: Business needs attention. Some KPIs show early warning signs that should be addressed.
healthSummaries.danger: Business health is critical. Multiple KPIs indicate significant problems requiring immediate action.

bottleneckSummaries.inventory: Inventory management is the primary bottleneck. Stock is sitting too long and eating into cashflow.
bottleneckSummaries.cashflow: Cashflow is the primary concern. Cash conversion cycle is too long — immediate action needed.
bottleneckSummaries.asset: Asset efficiency is the main issue. High CAPEX but low returns from assets.
bottleneckSummaries.logistics: Logistics performance is lagging. Delivery metrics are below target.
bottleneckSummaries.profitability: Profitability is under pressure. Margins are thin and returns are below expectations.
bottleneckSummaries.cost: Cost structure needs optimization. Operating expenses are disproportionately high.

kpi_ccc.purpose: Cash conversion cycle — how many days cash is tied up in operations. The smaller the better. Most critical KPI for business.

kpi_dio.purpose: Average days stock is held before selling. Lower = more efficient inventory management.

kpi_ar_days.purpose: Average days to collect receivables (DSO). Lower = faster cash collection.

kpi_ap_days.purpose: Average days to pay suppliers (DPO). Higher = better cashflow leverage.

kpi_roe.purpose: Return on Equity — how effectively owner's money generates profit. Target min 15%.

kpi_roa.purpose: Return on Assets — how efficiently total assets generate profit.

kpi_net_profit_margin.purpose: Percentage of revenue that becomes net profit after all expenses. Target min 10%.

kpi_gross_profit_margin.purpose: Gross margin — difference between revenue and COGS. Indicator of pricing power.

kpi_inventory_turnover.purpose: How many times inventory is sold out in a year. Higher = fast stock rotation.

kpi_asset_turnover.purpose: How efficiently assets are used to generate revenue.

kpi_cost_per_delivery.purpose: Average cost per delivery. Monitor logistics operation efficiency.

kpi_otd_rate.purpose: Percentage of deliveries on time. Target > 95%.

kpi_opex_vs_capex.purpose: OPEX = operating expenses (salaries, rent, fuel). CAPEX = capital expenditures (trucks, equipment). Track depreciation for owner insight.
